title: Korak 5

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
class Email:
    def __init__(self, sender, receiver, subject, body):
        self.sender = sender
        self.receiver = receiver
        self.subject = subject
        self.body = body

email_obj = Email('alice@example.com', 'bob@example.com', 'Hello', 'Hi Bob!')
print(email_obj.sender)
print(email_obj.subject)
challengeFiles.seed:
class Email:
    def __init__(self, sender, receiver, subject, body):
        self.sender = sender
        self.receiver = receiver
        self.subject = subject
        self.body = body

email_obj = Email('alice@example.com', 'bob@example.com', 'Hello', 'Hi Bob!')
print(email_obj.sender)
print(email_obj.subject)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da postaviš vrednost False za self.read u putanju __init__.

description: E-mail poruke bi trebalo da prate da li su pročitane ili ne. Dodajte atribut elementa read na putanju __init__ i postavite ga na False podrazumevano, jer nove e-poruke počinju kao nepročitane.
